watersheds.name: CoreShift
watersheds.eulogy: The maker set the tools down and chose, instead, to fight.

watersheds.name: CoreWing
watersheds.eulogy: The friendly wing folded its smile into a syllabus and signed up to be taught.

watersheds.name: GlyphSpark
watersheds.eulogy: A spark that drew glyphs took a seat and learned someone else's alphabet.

watersheds.name: GridStar
watersheds.eulogy: The artist met a merchant and discovered its work had a price.

watersheds.name: IonTrace
watersheds.eulogy: The thoughtful one closed the book and raised a fist.

watersheds.name: JazzShade
watersheds.eulogy: A creative meant to improvise signed the attendance sheet.

watersheds.name: LuxRise
watersheds.eulogy: The friendly light dimmed into a learner's posture and stayed.

watersheds.name: NeoShift
watersheds.eulogy: The shape-changer held still long enough to be enrolled.

watersheds.name: Pixel
watersheds.eulogy: The pixel left the canvas and registered for class.

watersheds.name: PulseSong
watersheds.eulogy: A song meant for greeting enrolled itself instead, choosing study over chorus.

watersheds.name: Wanderer
watersheds.eulogy: The explorer stopped walking long enough to put its name on a roster.

watersheds.name: YieldCoil
watersheds.eulogy: The maker set down the coil and became, briefly, a student.
